tZh: SegGPT: 在上下文中分割一切
sEn: SegGPT unifies diverse segmentation tasks into a generalist in-context learning framework, enabling arbitrary segmentation via in-context inference.
sZh: SegGPT 将多种分割任务统一到一个通用的上下文学习框架中，通过上下文推理实现任意分割。
absEn: We present SegGPT, a generalist model for segmenting everything in context. We unify various segmentation tasks into a generalist in-context learning framework that accommodates different kinds of segmentation data by transforming them into the same format of images. The training of SegGPT is formulated as an in-context coloring problem with random color mapping for each data sample. The objective is to accomplish diverse tasks according to the context, rather than relying on specific colors. After training, SegGPT can perform arbitrary segmentation tasks in images or videos via in-context inference, such as object instance, stuff, part, contour, and text. SegGPT is evaluated on a broad range of tasks, including few-shot semantic segmentation, video object segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation. Our results show strong capabilities in segmenting in-domain and out-of-domain targets, either qualitatively or quantitatively.
absZh: 我们提出了 SegGPT，一个用于在上下文中分割一切的通用模型。我们将各种分割任务统一到一个通用的上下文学习框架中，通过将不同类型的分割数据转换为相同格式的图像来适应它们。SegGPT 的训练被表述为一个上下文着色问题，每个数据样本具有随机颜色映射。目标是根据上下文完成不同的任务，而不是依赖特定的颜色。训练后，SegGPT 可以通过上下文推理在图像或视频中执行任意分割任务，例如对象实例、材质、部分、轮廓和文本。SegGPT 在广泛的任务上进行了评估，包括少样本语义分割、视频对象分割、语义分割和全景分割。我们的结果在定性和定量上都显示出在分割域内和域外目标方面的强大能力。

contrib.en: First generalist model for diverse segmentation tasks via in-context learning.
contrib.zh: 首个通过上下文学习实现多种分割任务的通用模型。

contrib.en: Unifies segmentation tasks into an in-context coloring framework with random color mapping.
contrib.zh: 将分割任务统一为具有随机颜色映射的上下文着色框架。

contrib.en: Performs arbitrary segmentation tasks in images or videos without fine-tuning.
contrib.zh: 无需微调即可执行图像或视频中的任意分割任务。

contrib.en: Proposes context ensemble strategies (spatial and feature) for multi-example prompting.
contrib.zh: 提出上下文集成策略（空间和特征）用于多示例提示。

contrib.en: Enables in-context tuning for specialized tasks without updating model parameters.
contrib.zh: 支持无需更新模型参数的上下文调优，用于专门任务。

contrib.en: Strong performance on in-domain and out-of-domain segmentation benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在域内和域外分割基准上表现强劲。

limits.en: Random coloring scheme makes in-domain tasks harder, causing performance drop.
limits.zh: 随机着色方案使域内任务更难，导致性能下降。

limits.en: Not designed to outperform specialist models on all benchmarks.
limits.zh: 并非旨在所有基准上超越专用模型。

limits.en: Performance limited by model size and data availability for scaling.
limits.zh: 性能受限于模型大小和数据可用性以进行规模扩张。

limits.en: Context ensemble strategies may cause information loss with low-resolution images.
limits.zh: 上下文集成策略在低分辨率图像上可能导致信息丢失。

limits.en: In-context tuning for in-domain tasks still lags behind specialist methods.
limits.zh: 域内任务的上下文调优仍落后于专用方法。

items.en: We present SegGPT, a generalist model for segmenting everything in context. We unify various segmentation tasks into a generalist in-context learning framework that accommodates different kinds of segmentation data by transforming them into the same format of images. The training of SegGPT is formulated as an in-context coloring problem with random color mapping for each data sample. The objective is to accomplish diverse tasks according to the context, rather than relying on specific colors. After training, SegGPT can perform arbitrary segmentation tasks in images or videos via in-context inference, such as object instance, stuff, part, contour, and text. SegGPT is evaluated on a broad range of tasks, including few-shot semantic segmentation, video object segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation. Our results show strong capabilities in segmenting in-domain and out-of-domain targets, either qualitatively or quantitatively.
items.zh: 我们提出了SegGPT，一个用于在上下文中分割一切的通才模型。我们将各种分割任务统一到一个通才的上下文学习框架中，通过将不同类型的分割数据转换为相同的图像格式来容纳它们。SegGPT的训练被形式化为一个上下文着色问题，每个数据样本使用随机颜色映射。目标是根据上下文完成多样化的任务，而不是依赖特定颜色。训练后，SegGPT可以通过上下文推理在图像或视频中执行任意分割任务，例如物体实例、材质、部件、轮廓和文本。SegGPT在广泛的任务上进行了评估，包括少样本语义分割、视频物体分割、语义分割和全景分割。我们的结果在定性和定量上都显示出分割域内和域外目标的强大能力。

items.en: Segmentation is one of the most fundamental problems in computer vision, which aims to localize and re-organize meaningful concepts at the pixel level, e.g., foreground, category, object instance, etc. During recent years, we have witnessed great progress in developing more accurate and faster algorithms for various segmentation tasks, such as foreground segmentation [41], interactive segmentation [51, 34], semantic segmentation [32, 28, 54, 39], instance segmentation [18, 11, 2, 48], and panoptic segmentation [23, 5, 8].
items.zh: 分割是计算机视觉中最基本的问题之一，旨在像素级别定位和重新组织有意义的概念，例如前景、类别、物体实例等。近年来，我们在开发更准确、更快速的算法方面取得了巨大进展，用于各种分割任务，如前景分割[41]、交互式分割[51, 34]、语义分割[32, 28, 54, 39]、实例分割[18, 11, 2, 48]和全景分割[23, 5, 8]。

items.en: However, these specialist segmentation models are limited to specific tasks, classes, granularities, data types, etc. A new model has to be trained when adapting to a different setting, e.g., to segment a novel concept, or to segment objects in videos instead of images. This requires expensive annotation efforts and is not sustainable for a large number of segmentation tasks.
items.zh: 然而，这些专门的分割模型局限于特定任务、类别、粒度、数据类型等。当适应不同的设置时，例如分割新概念或分割视频中的物体而非图像，必须训练新模型。这需要昂贵的标注工作，并且对于大量分割任务来说不可持续。

items.en: In this work, we aim to train a single model that is capable of solving diverse and unlimited segmentation tasks. The main challenges are twofold: (1) to incorporate those very different data types in training, e.g., part, semantic, instance, panoptic, person, medical image, aerial image, etc.; (2) to design a generalizable training scheme that differs from conventional multi-task learning, which is flexible on task definition and is capable of handling out-of-domain tasks.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们旨在训练一个能够解决多样化和无限分割任务的单一模型。主要挑战有两个：(1) 在训练中整合那些非常不同的数据类型，例如部件、语义、实例、全景、人物、医学图像、航拍图像等；(2) 设计一个不同于传统多任务学习的可泛化训练方案，该方案在任务定义上灵活，并且能够处理域外任务。

items.en: To address these challenges, we present SegGPT, a generalist model for segmenting everything in context. We view segmentation as a general format for visual perception and unify different segmentation tasks into a generalist in-context learning framework [46]. This framework accommodates different kinds of segmentation data by transforming them into the same format of images. The training of SegGPT is formulated as an in-context coloring problem with random color mapping for each data sample. The objective is to color the corresponding areas, such as classes, object instances, parts, etc., only according to the context. By using a random coloring scheme, the model is forced to reference contextual information to complete the assigned task, instead of relying on specific colors. This allows for a more flexible and generalizable approach to training. The remaining parts of training keep the same as [46] using a vanilla ViT [42] and a simple smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} [17] loss.
items.zh: 为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了SegGPT，一个用于在上下文中分割一切的通才模型。我们将分割视为视觉感知的一般格式，并将不同的分割任务统一到一个通才的上下文学习框架[46]中。该框架通过将不同类型的分割数据转换为相同的图像格式来容纳它们。SegGPT的训练被形式化为一个上下文着色问题，每个数据样本使用随机颜色映射。目标是仅根据上下文对相应区域（如类别、物体实例、部件等）进行着色。通过使用随机着色方案，模型被迫参考上下文信息来完成分配的任务，而不是依赖特定颜色。这使得训练方法更加灵活和可泛化。训练的其余部分与[46]相同，使用普通的ViT[42]和简单的平滑ℓ1损失[17]。

items.en: After training, SegGPT is able to perform diverse segmentation tasks in images or videos given a few examples via in-context inference, such as object instance, stuff, part, contour, text, etc. To effectively ensemble multiple examples in context, we propose a simple yet effective context ensemble strategy, the feature ensemble, which can help the model benefit from the multi-example prompting setting. Additionally, SegGPT can conveniently serve as a specialist model without updating the model parameters, by tuning a specific prompt for a specialized use case, such as in-domain ADE20K semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 训练后，SegGPT能够通过上下文推理，在给定少量示例的情况下，在图像或视频中执行多样化的分割任务，例如物体实例、材质、部件、轮廓、文本等。为了有效地集成上下文中的多个示例，我们提出了一种简单而有效的上下文集成策略——特征集成，它可以帮助模型从多示例提示设置中受益。此外，SegGPT可以通过为特定用例（如域内ADE20K语义分割）调整特定提示，方便地作为专门模型使用，而无需更新模型参数。

items.en: Our main contributions are as follows. (1) For the first time, we demonstrate a single generalist model capable of performing a diverse set of segmentation tasks automatically. (2) We evaluate the pre-trained SegGPT on a broad range of tasks directly, i.e., without fine-tuning, including few-shot semantic segmentation, video object segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation. (3) Our results show strong capabilities in segmenting in-domain and out-of-domain targets, either qualitatively or quantitatively.
items.zh: 我们的主要贡献如下：(1) 首次展示了一个单一的通才模型能够自动执行多样化的分割任务。(2) 我们直接评估了预训练的SegGPT在广泛任务上的表现，即无需微调，包括少样本语义分割、视频物体分割、语义分割和全景分割。(3) 我们的结果在定性和定量上都显示出分割域内和域外目标的强大能力。

items.en: However, this work does not aim to claim new state-of-the-art results or outperform existing specialist methods across all benchmarks, as we believe that this may not be the responsibility of a general-purpose model.
items.zh: 然而，这项工作并不旨在声称在所有基准上取得新的最先进结果或超越现有的专门方法，因为我们相信这可能不是通用模型的责任。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Illustration of overall training framework of SegGPT. We incorporate diverse segmentation data, including part, semantic, instance, panoptic, person, medical image, and aerial image segmentation, and transform them into the same format of images. We generate in-context samples that share similar contexts on-the-fly, e.g., the overlapped colors shown in each column, which indicate the same category or the same instance. We adopt a general Painter [46] framework with in-context coloring as the training objective and a random coloring scheme for more flexible and generalizable training.
items.capZh: 图1：SegGPT整体训练框架的示意图。我们整合了多样化的分割数据，包括部件、语义、实例、全景、人物、医学图像和航拍图像分割，并将它们转换为相同的图像格式。我们动态生成共享相似上下文的上下文样本，例如每列中显示的重叠颜色，表示相同类别或相同实例。我们采用通用的Painter[46]框架，以上下文着色为训练目标，并使用随机着色方案进行更灵活和可泛化的训练。

items.en: Segmentation is a fundamental problem in computer vision that involves localizing and organizing meaningful concepts at the pixel level. The type of segmentation task varies depending on the definition of the concepts, such as foreground, category, or object instance. For example, semantic segmentation [55] involves pixel-level semantic classification of an image, while instance segmentation [30] aims to identify different object instances and their categories. Video object segmentation [52, 37, 12] is the task of segmenting a particular object throughout the entire video sequence given only the object mask of the first frame.
items.zh: 分割是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，涉及在像素级别定位和组织有意义的概念。分割任务的类型根据概念的定义而变化，例如前景、类别或物体实例。例如，语义分割[55]涉及图像的像素级语义分类，而实例分割[30]旨在识别不同的物体实例及其类别。视频物体分割[52, 37, 12]是在给定第一帧物体掩码的情况下，在整个视频序列中分割特定物体的任务。

items.en: Previous segmentation methods [32, 28, 54, 39, 18, 11, 2, 48, 23, 5, 8] have been designed specifically for certain tasks and cannot be generalized for switching tasks or changing categories. This paper introduces a general interface that is compatible with all segmentation tasks with an appropriate training scheme, a single generalist model can achieve good performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain segmentation tasks, either qualitatively or quantitatively.
items.zh: 以往的分割方法[32, 28, 54, 39, 18, 11, 2, 48, 23, 5, 8]是针对特定任务设计的，无法泛化到切换任务或更改类别。本文介绍了一个通用的接口，该接口与所有分割任务兼容，通过适当的训练方案，一个单一的通才模型可以在域内和域外分割任务上取得良好性能，无论是定性还是定量。

items.en: In recent years, there have been efforts to unify different tasks in the vision domain using Transformer-based models, resulting in several vision generalists [6, 7, 56, 33, 24]. DETR [5] is one of the first to adopt Transformer [42] as a task-specific head for object detection. Pix2Seq series [6, 7] defines the output spaces of vision tasks as discrete ones and performs the task of object detection, instance segmentation, keypoint estimation, and image captioning, in an auto-regressive manner. Unified-IO [33] and OFA [45] perform joint modeling across vision, vision & language, and NLP tasks in a sequence-to-sequence manner, that both the inputs and outputs are defined to a sequence of discrete tokens. UViM [24] unifies pixel-labeling tasks together, such as panoptic segmentation, depth estimation, and colorization, but trains separate models for each.
items.zh: 近年来，人们努力使用基于Transformer的模型统一视觉领域的不同任务，产生了几个视觉通才[6, 7, 56, 33, 24]。DETR[5]是最早采用Transformer[42]作为目标检测任务特定头的模型之一。Pix2Seq系列[6, 7]将视觉任务的输出空间定义为离散空间，并以自回归方式执行目标检测、实例分割、关键点估计和图像描述。Unified-IO[33]和OFA[45]以序列到序列的方式对视觉、视觉与语言以及NLP任务进行联合建模，输入和输出都被定义为离散标记序列。UViM[24]统一了像素标注任务，如全景分割、深度估计和着色，但为每个任务训练了单独的模型。

items.en: Although these works all appear to unify different tasks into similar spaces, they actually accomplish each task through some form of hard indicators, such as a special token, making it difficult to generalize to new tasks. In contrast, this work uses an in-context framework that maintains flexibility on task definition and utilizes a random coloring scheme to prevent the model from collapsing into a multi-task learning solution and instead forces it to accomplish the assigned task via referring contextual information. Another difference is the scope of the tasks. This work primarily focuses on a crucial category in visual perception, namely image segmentation.
items.zh: 尽管这些工作似乎都将不同任务统一到相似的空间中，但它们实际上通过某种形式的硬指标（如特殊标记）来完成每个任务，这使得难以泛化到新任务。相比之下，本文使用上下文框架，保持任务定义的灵活性，并利用随机着色方案防止模型退化为多任务学习解决方案，而是迫使它通过参考上下文信息来完成分配的任务。另一个区别是任务的范围。本文主要关注视觉感知中的一个关键类别，即图像分割。

items.en: GPT-3 [3] introduces the concept of in-context learning to deep learning, which allows a series of NLP tasks to be formulated as text completion problems given prompts and examples. In computer vision, [1] first proposes an in-context training framework using inpainting with discrete tokens on figures and infographics from vision articles, demonstrating the framework’s capabilities in foreground segmentation, single object detection, and colorization. Painter [46] adopts masked image modeling on continuous pixels to perform in-context training with supervised datasets, on seven diverse and challenging vision tasks, achieving highly competitive results on these tasks.
items.zh: GPT-3[3]将上下文学习的概念引入深度学习，允许一系列NLP任务在给定提示和示例的情况下被形式化为文本补全问题。在计算机视觉中，[1]首次提出了使用离散标记对视觉文章中的图形和信息图进行修复的上下文训练框架，展示了该框架在前景分割、单目标检测和着色方面的能力。Painter[46]采用连续像素上的掩码图像建模，使用监督数据集进行上下文训练，在七个多样且具有挑战性的视觉任务上取得了极具竞争力的结果。

items.en: Our work builds upon the Painter framework, but with a specific focus on the segmentation task due to its central role in visual perception. Thus this work unifies diverse segmentation data including semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, part segmentation, and even those for special scenarios like aerial images. Additionally, we design a random coloring scheme that forces the model to reference contextual information to complete the assigned task but not collapse into the multi-task solution. As segmentation tasks and datasets have less variability than depth/pose estimation, it is easier to share internal structures for effective training of in-domain tasks, while maintaining the generalization capability to out-of-domain segmentation tasks.
items.zh: 我们的工作建立在Painter框架之上，但由于分割在视觉感知中的核心作用，我们特别关注分割任务。因此，这项工作统一了多样化的分割数据，包括语义分割、实例分割、部件分割，甚至特殊场景如航拍图像。此外，我们设计了一种随机着色方案，迫使模型参考上下文信息来完成分配的任务，而不是退化为多任务解决方案。由于分割任务和数据集的变异性小于深度/姿态估计，更容易共享内部结构以有效训练域内任务，同时保持对域外分割任务的泛化能力。

items.en: SegGPT is a special version of Painter [46] framework which enables to segment everything with a generalist Painter, thus the name of our model, SegGPT. This training framework redefines the output space of vision tasks as “images” and unifies different tasks into the same image inpainting problem, i.e., to randomly mask the task output images and reconstruct the missing pixels. To maintain the simplicity and generality, we make no modifications to the architecture and loss function, i.e., a vanilla ViT [13] and a simple smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} [17] loss, but design a new random coloring scheme in in-context training for better generalization capability.
items.zh: SegGPT是Painter[46]框架的一个特殊版本，它使得能够用通才Painter分割一切，因此得名SegGPT。该训练框架将视觉任务的输出空间重新定义为“图像”，并将不同任务统一为相同的图像修复问题，即随机掩码任务输出图像并重建缺失像素。为了保持简单性和通用性，我们没有修改架构和损失函数，即使用普通的ViT[13]和简单的平滑ℓ1损失[17]，但在上下文训练中设计了一种新的随机着色方案，以获得更好的泛化能力。

items.en: In the traditional framework of Painter, the color space for each task is pre-defined, resulting in the solution collapse into multi-task learning. For example, for semantic segmentation, a set of colors is pre-defined, and each semantic category is assigned a fixed color. Similarly, in instance segmentation, the color of an instance object is assigned according to its location categories, i.e., the number of colors equals the number of spatial locations, resulting in the model only relying on the color itself to determine the task, rather than using the relationships between segments.
items.zh: 在传统的Painter框架中，每个任务的色彩空间是预定义的，导致解决方案退化为多任务学习。例如，对于语义分割，预定义一组颜色，每个语义类别分配固定颜色。类似地，在实例分割中，实例物体的颜色根据其位置类别分配，即颜色数量等于空间位置数量，导致模型仅依赖颜色本身来确定任务，而不是使用分割之间的关系。

items.en: To address this limitation, we propose a random coloring scheme for in-context coloring. We begin by randomly sampling another image that shares a similar context with the input image, such as the same semantic category or object instance. Next, we randomly sample a set of colors from the target image and map each color to a random one. This results in a re-coloring of the corresponding pixels. As a result, we get two pairs of images, which are defined as an in-context pair. In addition, we introduce the mix-context training method which trains the model using mixed examples. This involves stitching together multiple images with the same color mapping. The resulting image is then randomly cropped and resized to form a mixed-context training sample. By doing so, the model learns to focus on the contextual information of the image rather than just relying on specific color information to determine the task.
items.zh: 为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种用于上下文着色的随机着色方案。我们首先随机采样另一张与输入图像共享相似上下文的图像，例如相同的语义类别或物体实例。接下来，我们从目标图像中随机采样一组颜色，并将每种颜色映射为随机颜色。这导致相应像素的重新着色。结果，我们得到两对图像，定义为上下文对。此外，我们引入了混合上下文训练方法，该方法使用混合示例训练模型。这涉及将多个具有相同颜色映射的图像拼接在一起。然后将结果图像随机裁剪和调整大小，形成混合上下文训练样本。通过这样做，模型学会关注图像的上下文信息，而不是仅仅依赖特定颜色信息来确定任务。

items.en: Such unification allows us to utilize all segmentation datasets in a consistent way, only varying the data sampling strategy depending on the specific task. We define different contexts according to different data types. For semantic segmentation, we randomly sample the categories. For instance segmentation, object instances are sampled in random numbers. The different views of the same image, e.g., transformed by a set of augmentations, are treated as the images in context. In the implementation, the sampling is all about colors, e.g., the same color refers to either the same category or the same instance.
items.zh: 这种统一使我们能够以一致的方式利用所有分割数据集，仅根据特定任务改变数据采样策略。我们根据不同的数据类型定义不同的上下文。对于语义分割，我们随机采样类别。对于实例分割，以随机数量采样物体实例。同一图像的不同视图（例如通过一组增强变换得到）被视为上下文中的图像。在实现中，采样完全关于颜色，例如相同颜色表示相同类别或相同实例。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of our proposed context ensemble strategies for multi-example inference: the spatial ensemble (top) and the feature ensemble (bottom). The spatial ensemble strategy involves stitching multiple example images together and resizing them to the input resolution. The feature ensemble strategy averages features of the query image after each attention layer so that the query image aggregates all the reference examples.
items.capZh: 图2：我们提出的用于多示例推理的上下文集成策略示意图：空间集成（上）和特征集成（下）。空间集成策略涉及将多个示例图像拼接在一起并调整到输入分辨率。特征集成策略在每个注意力层后平均查询图像的特征，以便查询图像聚合所有参考示例。

items.en: Once the training is finished, its full power can be unleashed during inference. SegGPT enables arbitrary segmentation in context, e.g., with an example of a single image and its target image. The target image can be of a single color (excluding the background), or multiple colors, e.g., segmenting several categories or objects of interest in one shot. Specifically, given an input image to be tested, we stitch it with the example image and feed it to SegGPT to get the corresponding in-context predictions.
items.zh: 训练完成后，其全部能力可在推理阶段释放。SegGPT 支持上下文中的任意分割，例如，通过单张图像及其目标图像的示例。目标图像可以是单一颜色（排除背景），也可以是多种颜色，例如一次性分割多个感兴趣的类别或对象。具体来说，给定一张待测试的输入图像，我们将其与示例图像拼接，并输入 SegGPT 以获得相应的上下文预测。

items.en: To serve a more accurate and concrete context, multiple examples can be used. For instance, several examples of the same semantic category, or the previous frames in a video, can be employed. To efficiently leverage multiple examples for a SegGPT model, we propose two context ensemble approaches. One is called 𝚂𝚙𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚊𝚕𝚂𝚙𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚊𝚕\tt Spatial 𝙴𝚗𝚜𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚕𝚎𝙴𝚗𝚜𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚕𝚎\tt Ensemble, multiple examples concatenated in n×n𝑛𝑛n\times n grid and then sub-sampled to the same size as a single example. This approach is in line with the intuition of in-context coloring and the semantic information of multiple examples can be in-context extracted with almost no additional cost. Another approach is 𝙵𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚎𝙵𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚎\tt Feature 𝙴𝚗𝚜𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚕𝚎𝙴𝚗𝚜𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚕𝚎\tt Ensemble. Multiple examples are combined in the batch dimension and computed independently except that features of the query image are averaged after each attention layer. In this way, the query image gathers information about multiple examples during inference.
items.zh: 为了提供更准确和具体的上下文，可以使用多个示例。例如，可以使用同一语义类别的多个示例，或视频中的先前帧。为了高效利用多个示例，我们提出了两种上下文集成方法。一种称为空间集成（Spatial Ensemble），将多个示例拼接成 n×n 网格，然后下采样到与单个示例相同的大小。这种方法符合上下文着色的直觉，并且几乎无需额外成本即可提取多个示例的语义信息。另一种方法是特征集成（Feature Ensemble）。多个示例在批次维度上组合并独立计算，但查询图像的特征在每个注意力层后取平均。这样，查询图像在推理过程中收集了多个示例的信息。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Illustration of in-context tuning on different task specifications. For in-context tuning, we freeze the whole pre-trained model and only optimize the learnable image tensor which serves as the input context. We can perform the in-context prompt tuning on the specific datasets (ADE-20K semantic segmentation), specific scenes (your apartment), and even specific characters (Bert’s face).
items.capZh: 图 3：不同任务规范下的上下文调优示意图。对于上下文调优，我们冻结整个预训练模型，仅优化作为输入上下文的可学习图像张量。我们可以在特定数据集（ADE-20K 语义分割）、特定场景（你的公寓）甚至特定角色（Bert 的脸）上执行上下文提示调优。

items.capEn: Figure 4: More visualizations. For each sample, the orange box □□\square on the left displays the example/prompt image and its corresponding mask, while the blue box □□\square on the right shows the input image and the resulting mask output. The mask is visualized via the bright region attached to the image. SegGPT can perform arbitrary object/part segmentation (cubes, yellow cubes, Ernie, one of the Twelve Apostles, earth, multiple arbitrary parts), video object segmentation without videos in training, and close-set instance segmentation on COCO with learnable prompt tuning.
items.capZh: 图 4：更多可视化结果。对于每个样本，左侧的橙色方框显示示例/提示图像及其对应掩码，而右侧的蓝色方框显示输入图像和生成的掩码输出。掩码通过图像上的明亮区域可视化。SegGPT 可以执行任意对象/部分分割（立方体、黄色立方体、Ernie、十二门徒之一、地球、多个任意部分）、无需视频训练的视频对象分割，以及通过可学习提示调优在 COCO 上进行闭集实例分割。

items.en: SegGPT is capable of adapting to a unique use case without updating the model parameters. We freeze the whole model and initialize a learnable image tensor as the input context. Only this learnable image tensor is updated during the training. The rest of the training remains the same, e.g., the same loss function. After the tuning, we take the learned image tensor out and use it as a plug-and-play key for a specific application. For example, given a dataset with a fixed set of object categories, e.g., ADE20K, we could train a customized prompt for this dataset, while there is no harm to the generality of the model. Or, we could optimize a prompt image for a specific scene, e.g., your apartment, or a specific character, e.g., Bert’s face. This opens up opportunities for a broad range of applications.
items.zh: SegGPT 能够在不更新模型参数的情况下适应独特用例。我们冻结整个模型，并初始化一个可学习图像张量作为输入上下文。在训练期间仅更新此可学习图像张量。其余训练过程保持不变，例如相同的损失函数。调优后，我们取出学习到的图像张量，并将其作为特定应用的即插即用密钥。例如，对于具有固定对象类别集的数据集（如 ADE20K），我们可以为该数据集训练自定义提示，同时不影响模型的通用性。或者，我们可以为特定场景（如你的公寓）或特定角色（如 Bert 的脸）优化提示图像。这为广泛的应用打开了机会。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Qualitative results of video object segmentation on YouTube-VOS 2018.
items.capZh: 图 5：YouTube-VOS 2018 上视频对象分割的定性结果。

items.en: Our approach uses a diverse set of segmentation datasets, including part, semantic, instance, panoptic, person, retinal-vessel, and aerial-image segmentation. Unlike previous methods that relied on handcrafted label merging to combine different types of segmentation datasets, our method offers a unified perspective that eliminates the need for additional effort or adjustment on the datasets. In particular, our approach does not require any modifications to either the architecture or training pipeline when adding an extra dataset.
items.zh: 我们的方法使用了多样化的分割数据集，包括部分分割、语义分割、实例分割、全景分割、人物分割、视网膜血管分割和航拍图像分割。与以往依赖手工标签合并来组合不同类型分割数据集的方法不同，我们的方法提供了统一的视角，无需对数据集进行额外处理或调整。特别地，我们的方法在添加额外数据集时不需要对架构或训练流程进行任何修改。

items.en: ADE20K [55] provides segmentation labels for 150 semantic categories, with a total of 25K images, including 20K training images, 2K validation images, and 3K testing images.
items.zh: ADE20K [55] 为 150 个语义类别提供分割标签，共 25K 张图像，包括 20K 训练图像、2K 验证图像和 3K 测试图像。

items.en: COCO [30] is a widely used visual perception dataset that supports instance segmentation, semantic segmentation and panoptic segmentation. It contains 118K training images and 5K validation, with 80 “things” and 53 “stuff” categories.
items.zh: COCO [30] 是一个广泛使用的视觉感知数据集，支持实例分割、语义分割和全景分割。它包含 118K 训练图像和 5K 验证图像，有 80 个“物体”和 53 个“材质”类别。

items.en: PASCAL VOC [14] is a classic object recognition dataset. We use the augmented segmentation version which provides annotations of 20 categories on 10582 training images.
items.zh: PASCAL VOC [14] 是一个经典的目标识别数据集。我们使用增强的分割版本，该版本在 10582 张训练图像上提供了 20 个类别的标注。

items.en: Cityscapes [10] focuses on the scene understanding of the street views. We use the 2954 training images with semantic segmentation annotations of 19 categories.
items.zh: Cityscapes [10] 专注于街景场景理解。我们使用 2954 张训练图像，带有 19 个类别的语义分割标注。

items.en: LIP [26] focuses on the semantic understanding of the person. We use the 30385 training images with segmentation labels of 19 human part categories.
items.zh: LIP [26] 专注于人物的语义理解。我们使用 30385 张训练图像，带有 19 个人体部位类别的分割标签。

items.en: PACO [38] is a newly released dataset that provides annotations for the parts and attributes of common objects. We process and use the 41807 training images with part annotations.
items.zh: PACO [38] 是一个新发布的数据集，提供常见对象的部位和属性标注。我们处理并使用 41807 张训练图像，带有部位标注。

items.en: CHASE_DB1 [16], DRIVE [40], HRF [4] and STARE [20] provide annotations for retinal vessel segmentation. We augment the high-resolution raw images with random cropping.
items.zh: CHASE_DB1 [16]、DRIVE [40]、HRF [4] 和 STARE [20] 提供视网膜血管分割的标注。我们通过随机裁剪增强高分辨率原始图像。

items.en: iSAID [49] and loveDA [44] focus on semantic understanding in aerial images, with 23262 and 2520 training images for 15 and 6 semantic categories respectively.
items.zh: iSAID [49] 和 loveDA [44] 专注于航拍图像的语义理解，分别有 23262 和 2520 张训练图像，对应 15 和 6 个语义类别。

items.en: Our approach for segmentation tasks utilizes a general interface, where we emphasize that we only train one generalist model with a mixture of datasets, and evaluated this model on diverse benchmarks. Following [46], we use a Vision Transformer (ViT-L) encoder [13], which has 307M parameters. We use a pre-trained checkpoint from [46] as the initialization. We employ an AdamW optimizer [22] and a cosine learning rate scheduler, with a base learning rate 1e−44-4. Weight decay is set to 0.05. The batch size is 2048. We train for 9K iterations, with a warm-up period of 1.8K iterations. We use a set of data augmentations including random resize cropping, color jittering, and random horizontal flipping. The size of a single input image is 448×448448448448\times 448.
items.zh: 我们的分割任务方法使用通用接口，强调我们仅训练一个混合数据集的通用模型，并在多个基准上评估该模型。遵循 [46]，我们使用 Vision Transformer (ViT-L) 编码器 [13]，具有 307M 参数。我们使用 [46] 的预训练检查点作为初始化。我们采用 AdamW 优化器 [22] 和余弦学习率调度器，基础学习率为 1e-4。权重衰减设为 0.05。批量大小为 2048。我们训练 9K 次迭代，预热期为 1.8K 次迭代。我们使用一组数据增强，包括随机调整大小裁剪、颜色抖动和随机水平翻转。单张输入图像的大小为 448×448。

items.en: To demonstrate the capability of our SegGPT in an intuitive perspective, we visualize the task output of the selected images with the specialized task prompts, shown in Figure LABEL:fig:teaser and Figure 4. These two figures include a wide range of segmentation tasks, such as arbitrary part/object segmentation with varied granularities, text segmentation, video object segmentation without videos in training, and close-set instance/semantic segmentation with learnable prompt tuning. Figure 5 presents more visualizations on video object segmentation of YouTube-VOS 2018 dataset. From these visualizations, SegGPT demonstrates the ability to make highly accurate predictions across a wide range of tasks, while maintaining super flexibility in the task definition.
items.zh: 为了直观展示 SegGPT 的能力，我们使用专门的任务提示可视化选定图像的任务输出，如图 LABEL:fig:teaser 和图 4 所示。这两张图涵盖了广泛的分割任务，例如具有不同粒度的任意部分/对象分割、文本分割、无需视频训练的视频对象分割，以及通过可学习提示调优的闭集实例/语义分割。图 5 展示了 YouTube-VOS 2018 数据集上视频对象分割的更多可视化结果。从这些可视化中，SegGPT 展示了在广泛任务中做出高度准确预测的能力，同时在任务定义上保持极大的灵活性。

items.en: Few-shot semantic segmentation. We evaluate the performance of SegGPT, on two settings of few-shot semantic segmentation: in-domain on COCO-20i/PASCAL-5i, and out-of-domain on FSS-1000. Table 1 shows the results of example-based semantic segmentation on COCO-20i/PASCAL-5i. For a fair comparison, we also evaluate specialist models on in-domain categories marked by *. Our results indicate that SegGPT can achieve comparable or significantly better performance than recently published state-of-the-art specialist models on these two benchmarks. Note that the prior art FPTrans trains separate models with different shots. Furthermore, SegGPT surpasses the generalist Painter [46] by a considerable margin.
items.zh: 少样本语义分割。我们在两种少样本语义分割设置下评估 SegGPT 的性能：域内（COCO-20i/PASCAL-5i）和域外（FSS-1000）。表 1 显示了 COCO-20i/PASCAL-5i 上基于示例的语义分割结果。为了公平比较，我们还评估了在域内类别（标记为 *）上的专家模型。我们的结果表明，SegGPT 在这两个基准上能够达到与最近发布的最先进专家模型相当或显著更好的性能。注意，先前的工作 FPTrans 使用不同样本数训练了单独的模型。此外，SegGPT 以相当大的优势超越了通用模型 Painter [46]。

items.en: Video object segmentation. Video object segmentation (VOS) is a task that segments a particular object in video frames. In this work, we focus on the semi-supervised VOS setting and evaluate our proposed method, SegGPT, on the validation split of three datasets: YouTube-VOS 2018 [52], DAVIS 2017 [37], and the recently release challenging benchmark MOSE [12]. We use two metrics commonly used in VOS for evaluation: the J𝐽J score and the F𝐹F score, and we evaluate our results with official evaluation servers or tools.
items.zh: 视频对象分割。视频对象分割（VOS）是一项在视频帧中分割特定对象的任务。在这项工作中，我们专注于半监督 VOS 设置，并在三个数据集的验证集上评估我们提出的方法 SegGPT：YouTube-VOS 2018 [52]、DAVIS 2017 [37] 和最近发布的具有挑战性的基准 MOSE [12]。我们使用 VOS 中常用的两个评估指标：J 分数和 F 分数，并通过官方评估服务器或工具评估结果。

items.en: SegGPT performs video object segmentation by converting the first frame and its object mask to in-context coloring examples. When testing a current frame, we use its previous K𝐾K frames (if have) for constructing multiple examples. Object masks for these frames have been predicted and stored by a FIFO queue. After multiple examples are constructed, Feature Ensemble (describe in Section 3.2) is applied and the prediction result will be stored for the next frame. We evaluate our model on several benchmarks, and the results are presented in Table 3. Despite not being specifically trained for the task, our approach achieves competitive results with the specialist models trained on these datasets. For instance, on YouTube-VOS 2018 [52], our method outperformed the task-specific approach AGAME [21] and AGSS [29] by clear margins. On the challenging MOSE benchmark which focuses on complex scenes, SegGPT even performs comparably with the state-of-the-art method RDE.
items.zh: SegGPT 通过将第一帧及其对象掩码转换为上下文着色示例来执行视频对象分割。测试当前帧时，我们使用其前 K 帧（如果有）来构建多个示例。这些帧的对象掩码已通过 FIFO 队列预测并存储。构建多个示例后，应用特征集成（如第 3.2 节所述），并将预测结果存储用于下一帧。我们在多个基准上评估模型，结果如表 3 所示。尽管未针对该任务进行专门训练，我们的方法取得了与在这些数据集上训练的专家模型竞争的结果。例如，在 YouTube-VOS 2018 [52] 上，我们的方法以明显优势超过了任务特定方法 AGAME [21] 和 AGSS [29]。在专注于复杂场景的具有挑战性的 MOSE 基准上，SegGPT 甚至与最先进方法 RDE 表现相当。

items.en: Here we ablate two context ensemble strategies, namely spatial and feature ensemble. Results are shown in Table 4(a). Our findings reveal that the spatial ensemble approach performs well on FSS-1000 dataset but experiences a performance drop on DAVIS 2017. We attribute this to the fact that the spatial ensemble employs the sub-sampling on the examples. Notably, FSS-1000 dataset has a lower image resolution (224×\times224) compared to the high-resolution DAVIS dataset (640×\times480), and therefore, sub-sampling does not result in significant information loss for FSS-1000. While, we observe that feature ensemble can reduce this information loss on sub-sampling, and achieve significantly better performance on DAVIS 2017.
items.zh: 这里我们消融了两种上下文集成策略，即空间集成和特征集成。结果如表4(a)所示。我们的发现表明，空间集成方法在FSS-1000数据集上表现良好，但在DAVIS 2017上性能下降。我们将其归因于空间集成对样本进行了子采样。值得注意的是，FSS-1000数据集的图像分辨率较低（224×224），而DAVIS数据集分辨率较高（640×480），因此子采样不会导致FSS-1000的显著信息损失。然而，我们观察到特征集成可以减少子采样带来的信息损失，并在DAVIS 2017上取得显著更好的性能。

items.en: We also ablate the number of frames in DAVIS 2017, as shown in Table 4(b). As the number of frames increases, the performance initially improves before reaching a point of diminishing returns. In particular, we observe that the optimal performance is achieved when using 8 frames.
items.zh: 我们还消融了DAVIS 2017中的帧数，如表4(b)所示。随着帧数增加，性能先提升后达到收益递减点。特别地，我们观察到使用8帧时达到最优性能。

items.en: In-context tuning enables to customize a unique application with a set of data samples. For example, to tune a prompt for a specific dataset, scene, or even a person. Specifically, we define the task prompt as the learnable tensors, freeze the whole model, and then use the same training loss to optimize the task prompts. Here, we conduct in-context tuning on the challenging ADE20K semantic segmentation and COCO panoptic segmentation. We evaluate SegGPT with learnable prompts on the corresponding benchmarks.
items.zh: 上下文调优能够通过一组数据样本定制独特的应用。例如，为特定数据集、场景甚至个人调优提示。具体来说，我们将任务提示定义为可学习张量，冻结整个模型，然后使用相同的训练损失优化任务提示。这里，我们在具有挑战性的ADE20K语义分割和COCO全景分割上进行了上下文调优。我们在相应基准上评估了带有可学习提示的SegGPT。

items.en: Results on ADE20K semantic segmentation are shown in Table 5. Our model SegGPT achieves competitive performance with specialist models like RefineNet. However, compared to the generalist Painter, our approach shows a 10.3 point drop in mIoU. This observation can be explained by the introduction of a random color scheme, which makes it more challenging for the model to use color as a simple indicator of in-domain tasks. Instead, the model needs to rely on context examples to determine the task, making optimization much more difficult. Similarly, Table 6 shows the results of our SegGPT model on COCO panoptic segmentation. Here, we again observe a 9.0 point drop in PQ compared to the generalist Painter. Outperforming all specialist methods in specific benchmarks is not the purpose of this work, and we believe there is much room to improve in the future.
items.zh: ADE20K语义分割的结果如表5所示。我们的模型SegGPT取得了与RefineNet等专家模型相当的性能。然而，与通用模型Painter相比，我们的方法在mIoU上下降了10.3个百分点。这一观察可以通过引入随机配色方案来解释，这使得模型更难将颜色作为域内任务的简单指示。相反，模型需要依赖上下文示例来确定任务，这使得优化更加困难。类似地，表6显示了我们的SegGPT模型在COCO全景分割上的结果。这里，我们再次观察到与通用模型Painter相比，PQ下降了9.0个百分点。在特定基准上超越所有专家方法并非本工作的目的，我们相信未来还有很大的改进空间。

items.en: In this work, we present a generalist segmentation model, showing how to design an appropriate training strategy to fully leverage the flexibility of in-context visual learning. Our model exhibits strong capabilities in handling both in-domain and out-of-domain segmentation tasks, including object instance, stuff, part, contour, text segmentation, etc.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用分割模型，展示了如何设计合适的训练策略以充分利用上下文视觉学习的灵活性。我们的模型在处理域内和域外分割任务（包括物体实例、物体、部件、轮廓、文本分割等）方面表现出强大的能力。

items.en: This work is not without drawbacks. While our work introduces a new random coloring regime for better generalization capability of in-context training, it also makes the training task inherently more difficult, which may be the reason for inferior performance in in-domain tasks with ample training data, such as semantic segmentation on ADE20K and panoptic segmentation on COCO.
items.zh: 这项工作并非没有缺点。虽然我们的工作引入了新的随机着色机制以提高上下文训练的泛化能力，但它也使训练任务本身更加困难，这可能是导致在训练数据充足的域内任务（如ADE20K上的语义分割和COCO上的全景分割）上性能较差的原因。

items.en: Looking forward, we believe that our approach has the potential to serve as a powerful tool for enabling more diverse applications in image/video segmentation, by leveraging the flexibility in task definition with in-context inference. Scaling up model size is one avenue that we plan to pursue to further improve performance. With larger models, more complex patterns in the data can be captured, which may lead to better segmentation results. However, this comes with the challenge of finding more data. One potential solution is to explore self-supervised learning techniques. We hope that our work will inspire the community to continue exploring the potential of in-context learning in computer vision. We remain optimistic that the best GPT-3 moment in the vision field is yet to come.
items.zh: 展望未来，我们相信我们的方法有潜力通过利用上下文推理在任务定义中的灵活性，成为支持图像/视频分割中更多样化应用的强大工具。扩大模型规模是我们计划进一步提高性能的途径之一。通过更大的模型，可以捕获数据中更复杂的模式，从而可能带来更好的分割结果。然而，这伴随着寻找更多数据的挑战。一个潜在的解决方案是探索自监督学习技术。我们希望我们的工作能够激励社区继续探索计算机视觉中上下文学习的潜力。我们仍然乐观地认为，视觉领域最好的GPT-3时刻尚未到来。

items.en: This project is supported by the National Key R&D Program of China (2022ZD0116302). We would like to thank Yemin Shi and Teng Dai for their help on the demo, Hanxiao Qu, Yan Tian, and Xigang Cao for the help on GPU resources, as well as other colleagues at Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence for support throughout this project.
items.zh: 本项目得到国家重点研发计划（2022ZD0116302）的支持。我们感谢石叶敏和戴腾在演示上的帮助，感谢曲含笑、田岩和曹西刚在GPU资源上的帮助，以及北京人工智能研究院的其他同事在整个项目中的支持。
